text.title: market-sizing-with-ai Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for market-sizing-with-ai as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Using ChatGPT or Claude as the primary source for a market figure without requiring a citation URL.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: LLMs frequently fabricate specific market numbers that sound plausible but have no primary source; they cannot cite a page they did not read.
